University College of Engineering (A) · Osmania University

BE Biomedical
Study Hub

One place for everything: the full BME course syllabus, the mathematics syllabus and study plan, comprehensive and concise mathematics tutorials, and a programming guide. Work through them in order, or jump to what you need.

Programme: BE Biomedical Engineering College: UCE (A), Osmania University
01

BME Syllabus

Start with the big picture — the complete BE Biomedical Engineering course, so you know what every semester holds.

BE Biomedical Engineering · all 8 semesters

The complete course syllabus

The full scheme of instruction, sourced from the official UCE Osmania department page: every semester's subjects, labs and credits, plus the programme's vision, mission and outcomes. Your map for the whole four years.

8 semesters · 4 yearsNBA accreditedworks offline
Open
02

Maths Syllabus & Study Plan

Zoom in on the four mathematics papers — every unit, textbook and a semester-by-semester study plan.

Mathematics I – IV · syllabus + plan

The mathematics syllabus, unit by unit

All four maths papers transcribed from the official OU / UCE PDFs — course objectives, outcomes, textbooks, and a "why it matters for biomedical engineering" note for each. Includes a week-by-week study plan and exam strategy.

BS 101 · 201 · 901 · 401 MTsyllabus + planworks offline
Open
03

Maths — Comprehensive Tutorial

The main study resource: one slow, worked module per paper. Plain-English lessons, examples that build from easy to exam-level, and practice questions with tap-to-reveal solutions. This is where the real learning happens.

BS 101 MT · Semester 1

Mathematics I

Sequences & series, differential calculus, functions of several variables, multiple integrals, vector calculus.

Learn & practise BS 201 MT · Semester 2

Mathematics II

Matrices & eigenvalues, first-order ODEs, higher-order linear ODEs, series solutions, Legendre & Bessel.

Learn & practise BS 901 MT · Semester 3 · BME

Mathematics III

Complex variables, residue calculus, Fourier series, partial differential equations, heat & wave equations.

Learn & practise BS 401 MT · Semester 4

Mathematics IV

Laplace, Fourier & Z transforms, numerical methods, curve fitting, correlation & regression.

Learn & practise
04

Maths — Concise Tutorial

Once you know the material, use this for fast revision — every unit's key results and traps in one place.

All 4 papers · condensed · tabbed

The quick revision tutorial

For each of the 20 units: the core idea, the key results to memorise, one worked example, and the mistakes that cost marks — tabbed by paper. Best used close to an exam, after you've worked through the comprehensive modules.

all 20 unitstabbed by paperneeds internet for equations
Open
05

Programming Tutorial

The programming coursework that runs alongside the maths — C, Python and data structures.

C · Python · Data Structures

The programming & data structures guide

A source-checked map of the C coursework in the BME scheme, a genuine zero-to-hero Python course you can follow with no background, and a data-structures guide broken into the smallest possible steps. Includes a study plan and textbook list.

C · Python · DSzero to herowith study plan
Open

Good to know. The mathematics tutorial pages (comprehensive modules and the concise tutorial) load a maths renderer and web fonts from the internet, so keep a connection for those. The BME syllabus, maths syllabus and programming pages work essentially offline.

About this hub

A compiled study resource for BE Biomedical Engineering, University College of Engineering (Autonomous), Osmania University. Syllabus content is transcribed from the official OU / UCE department pages; mathematics explanations, worked examples and practice are standard treatments aligned to the prescribed texts (Grewal; Jain & Iyengar; Kreyszig; Raisinghania; Brown & Churchill; Vasishtha & Gupta; Gupta & Kapoor).

Pages in this site, in order:

  1. bme-syllabus.html — BE Biomedical Engineering syllabus (8 semesters)
  2. syllabus.html — mathematics syllabus & study plan
  3. maths1-learn.html · maths2-learn.html · maths3-learn.html · maths4-learn.html — comprehensive tutorial (Maths I–IV)
  4. tutorial.html — concise tutorial (all units)
  5. programming.html — C, Python & data structures guide
Worked examples and practice are illustrative — always pair them with your prescribed textbooks and past Osmania University question papers. Compiled study reference, not an official university publication.  Prepared 05 July 2026.
